jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at SEBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
